title: AE2 Guide - Russian Localization
description: Adds Russian localization to the guide from AE2
body:
## 📜 Short description

  **This resourcepack adds Russian localization for the guide from the Applied Energestics 2 mod**

## 📝 Contact details

 - **My discord (Main Translator): Donne431#6562 / donne431**

 - **Translator assistant: Daniamaps (discord: daniamaps)**

 - **Discord server:
   https://discord.gg/NQBhQRDEhF**

- **My website - https://donne431.github.io**

- **Donate ☕ - https://www.donationalerts.com/r/donne431**
   
## ‼️ Warning
1. **Please, if you have published this mod on another site, provide a link to *CurseForge* or *Modrinth*, thanks in advance.**
